name: Korea Grand Tour
futureChatInstructions: Start by reading this file and the latest exported theme under backups/.
Use Chrome/Computer Use against the logged-in Weebly editor for live application.
Draft and test changes locally before editing Weebly.
Save only after showing the user the intended change.
Publish only after explicit user approval.
notes: The www-prefixed Weebly subdomain did not load during public inspection.
The canonical public site loaded at https://koreagrandtour.weebly.com/.
The public page includes Weebly branding, which suggests a classic Weebly-hosted site rather than a custom Square Online domain.
The Square Sites API returned no sites after OAuth authorization, so live code rollout should use the Weebly editor path.
The Weebly code editor exposes HTML layouts, Less styles, partials, and assets; export the theme before every code rollout.
